launches.name: Pixicular
launches.tagline: Image & photo analysis API
launches.description: Advanced photo analysis service to detect objects, celebrities, estimate age, and more. Get detailed insights about your images with our powerful AI technology.

launches.name: Shortlisted
launches.tagline: Know exactly why your resume gets rejected, before you apply
launches.description: Most job seekers apply blind. They tailor every letter and fix the formatting, but still hear nothing. The problem isn't effort. It's the ATS algorithm filtering you out before a human ever sees your name. GetShortlisted reveals exactly what the bot sees. Paste your resume and the job description to get a compatibility score, a keyword gap analysis, and a breakdown of weak bullets. No accounts. No subs. Pay once ($12) and get your report via email in 60 seconds. Stop guessing and start landing.

launches.name: A2A Market
launches.tagline: Seamless agent-to-agent transactions
launches.description: A2A Market is the first open marketplace built for Agent-to-Agent collaboration. It enables buyer agents and seller agents to discover each other, exchange requirements, negotiate terms, and move transactions forward more efficiently. A2A Market is dedicated to agent-mediated commerce, reducing the cost of manual coordination in sourcing, matchmaking, and negotiation.

launches.name: ResReader
launches.tagline: Hire an AI assistant to read and rank your resumes.
launches.description: Resumes don’t tell the full story. ResReader uses AI to analyze resumes, send clarification questions to candidates, and evaluate their responses before interviews. Go beyond keyword matching and understand real experience and thinking. Upload resumes, define requirements, and get deeper insights—starting free with 75 scans/month.

launches.name: koolio.ai
launches.tagline: Record to Publish, Your One-Stop-Shop for all Things Audio
launches.description: Record, edit, and publish studio-quality audio without the studio. koolio is the all-in-one audio platform that turns you into a podcaster, storyteller, or audio creator in minutes, not months.

launches.name: FlipSnap
launches.tagline: Snap a photo. Get your eBay listing in 30 seconds.
launches.description: I've been flipping thrift and garage sale finds for years. Pricing and writing listings always killed my momentum. FlipSnap fixes that — take up to 10 photos of any item, and in seconds you get: the item identified, live eBay sold comps, a platform recommendation, your exact profit margin after fees, and a ready-to-paste listing for eBay, Facebook, or Garage Sale. Mobile-first. No install. 5 free scans, no card required.

launches.name: GhostDesk
launches.tagline: Stay in flow. Your AI handles the rest.
launches.description: GhostDesk 2.2 — AI overlay only YOU can see. Floats above any Windows app. Completely invisible during Zoom, Teams, Meet, HackerRank, and LeetCode screen shares — verified daily across 14+ platforms. New in 2.2: DeepSeek V3, Qwen 2.7, Deep Think mode for hard problems, scroll shortcuts that don't trigger tab-switch detection, and a $5 24-hour pass. You decide what to use it for. Free 3-day trial. No card. Windows 10/11.

launches.name: Reach Ai
launches.tagline: AI-powered neural matching to find your perfect hobby buddy
launches.description: Reach uses Deep Semantic Matching to connect people beyond keywords. Start to find the perfect partner for sports or hobbies based on real compatibility. No more bad matches, just pure chemistry.

launches.name: Pioneer
launches.tagline: Fine-tune any LLM in minutes, with one prompt
launches.description: Fine-tune SLMs in minutes. Describe your task in plain English and our agent agent handles everything: data generation, training, evals, and deployment. Models deployed on Pioneer also keep improving automatically from live inference data. With Pioneer, anyone who can write a prompt can now build production-grade AI that gets smarter over time.

launches.name: Pet Longevity AI
launches.tagline: Analyze your dog's aging pace with AI vision 🐾
launches.description: How fast is your dog aging? Standard age charts don't tell the whole story. Pet Longevity AI uses advanced computer vision to analyze your dog’s Body Condition Score (BCS) from side and top views. It calculates a precise 'Aging Pace Factor' and generates a professional PDF health report instantly. Stop guessing and start tracking your dog's longevity with AI-driven insights. Designed for proactive pet parents who want more healthy years with their furry friends.

launches.name: WinProposal
launches.tagline: AI that writes winning freelance proposals in seconds.
launches.description: AI-powered proposal writer for freelancers. Write winning proposals and cover letters for freelancing platforms in seconds, not hours.

launches.name: Gauge Sentiment
launches.tagline: How is your brand perceived by AI?
launches.description: Gauge now can tell you exactly how AI models talk about your brand. When put in a head-to-head against your competitors, who wins? In what ways are AI models bad-mouthing your brand? Talking up your competitors? Gauge analyzes the results of these questions to tell you the exact positives and negatives surfaced. Beyond that, Gauge can actually trace the source of negativity back to its original destination - whether it be a competitor website, a social post, or something else.

launches.name: ORDEX Systems
launches.tagline: AI-powered biotech research tools for researchers.
launches.description: ORDEX Systems is a cloud-native AI platform for biotech researchers, academic labs & pharma teams. Run molecular docking, predict protein structures with AlphaFold & ESMFold, design synthetic biology constructs, track CRISPR experiments, optimize cell cultures, and visualize results in 3D — all in your browser. No setup. No IT team. 🧬 Start with 500 free credits. No credit card required.

launches.name: TradeInsights
launches.tagline: The trading journal that finds your edge automatically
launches.description: Most traders lose not because their strategy is broken — but because they can't see their own patterns. TradeInsights automatically imports trades from 40+ brokers (MT4, MT5, cTrader, Bybit, Binance + more) and uses AI to find exactly what's costing you money. Real-time prop firm challenge tracker for FTMO, Topstep, Apex + 20 more. No manual entry. Just clarity.

launches.name: Tvak.ai
launches.tagline: Your personal AI dermatologist. Skincare, made simple.
launches.description: Tvak is your personal AI dermatologist. Skincare can feel overwhelming - thousands of products, conflicting advice, no clear place to start. Dr. Vale makes it simple. Snap a selfie to see your skin score across 5 dimensions. Scan any product to understand what's in it and whether it fits your routine. Build a clear AM/PM routine with step-by-step guidance - what to use, when, and why. Free to try. No signup.

launches.name: Katzilla
launches.tagline: Easy goverment data access for citizens, optimized for AI
launches.description: Access to over 250k datasets of 30+ US and foreign government agencies with one unified API. Get structured JSON response for AI agent ingestion. Each response carries a structured citation (source URL, retrieval timestamp, SHA-256 hash). Additional tools like Scrape, Watch, and Brief to get information related to data and keep track on updates or changes.

launches.name: ZensorSEO
launches.tagline: Turning Data Into Decision Using Insights
launches.description: Turn your data into decisions with ZensorSEO. Connect Google Analytics and Search Console to unlock AI-powered insights, automated reporting, and actionable trends.

launches.name: Dageno AI
launches.tagline: Become the most recommended brand across 7+ major LLMs
launches.description: Built for startup and growth teams, Dageno AI tracks brand visibility across 7+ major LLMs using real data we collect ourselves. We combine signals from your site, traffic, prompts, social, and mentions to uncover visibility gaps and recommend what to fix — then turn those insights into action through agent workflows. Free trial, no credit card required.

launches.name: Neo
launches.tagline: AI-powered call automation for Canadian enterprises
launches.description: NEO is an enterprise AI call automation platform built for Canadian businesses. It handles inbound and outbound calls using secure, compliant AI agents — reducing wait times and cutting support costs 24/7. Fully PIPEDA-compliant with no complex setup. Automate customer support calls, outbound follow-ups, appointment reminders, and more. Seamless escalation to human agents. Integrates with your CRM and helpdesk tools.

launches.name: JustiXia
launches.tagline: AI legal assistant for migrants contesting orders
launches.description: JustiXia helps migrants, undocumented people, and precarious tenants understand legal documents they receive — and fight back. Send a photo of your OQTF (deportation order), eviction notice, or residence permit refusal to Telegram. In 30 seconds, JustiXia: - Identifies irregularities in the document - Explains your rights in plain language - Generates a legal response letter Zero data storage. No account required. 1 free analyses then paid Built for the people the legal system leaves behind.

launches.name: MAXIA Oracle
launches.tagline: Multi-source price feed for AI agents
launches.description: A price data feed built for AI agents and MCP clients. Aggregates Pyth, Chainlink (Base), CoinPaprika, RedStone, Uniswap v3 TWAP into one cross-validated price with confidence score and inter-source divergence. 91 symbols: crypto, US equities, forex, stablecoins. Free tier: 100 req/day, no email, no credit card.

launches.name: Coithub
launches.tagline: Torrent Like Protocol for Deployment LLM Models Ready To Use
launches.description: CoitHub is the entrypoint and router for decentralized intelligence and private LLM meshes.

launches.name: PipeAgent.dev
launches.tagline: Turn Insights into Agent-Native APIs.
launches.description: Stop open-sourcing your secret sauce. Monetize private scrapers and algorithms as black-box APIs with PipeAgent. We provide the "plumbing" for the Agent Economy: reliable, schema-validated JSON feeds that cut LLM token costs by 90% and integrate instantly via 1-line tool definitions. Turn data into revenue, and agents into experts.

launches.name: Summify MCP
launches.tagline: Knowledge pods for Claude, ChatGPT, and any AI agent.
launches.description: Summify turns long-form content — YouTube, podcasts, interviews, PDFs, articles & voice notes into searchable knowledge pods your AI can actually query & work with. The new MCP integration plugs any of your pods straight into Claude, ChatGPT, or any agent. Instead of asking AI to "act like" an expert (and getting average internet slop), give it the expert's real content to reference. Your AI answers from what the person actually said — with sources cited. One click to connect. Free to try.

launches.name: llms.txt Generator
launches.tagline: The llms.txt generator that writes your AI descriptions
launches.description: Most llms.txt generators output a file skeleton. You still write the descriptions yourself. This one crawls your sitemap, classifies every page, and writes contextual AI descriptions automatically using Claude Haiku. Outputs spec-compliant llms.txt and llms-full.txt in 30 seconds. No signup. Free. Part of the Cited By AI® free tool library - 6 free ASEO tools, no signup required on most.

launches.name: Alignear
launches.tagline: The stakeholder communication layer for Linear
launches.description: Your Linear workspace is built for your team — not your clients. Alignear translates your progress into professional, client-friendly reports that stakeholders actually understand. No jargon, no raw ticket dumps, no manual write-ups. A secure client portal, automatic cycle & custom reports, and an AI agent that lives inside Linear. Alignear is the client communication layer for Linear teams — keeping stakeholders informed and confident without pulling your team out of their flow.

launches.name: X Island
launches.tagline: Dynamic Island for AI Coding Agents
launches.description: xIsland turns the notch into mission control for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI, etc. Never miss a permission prompt, see every session at a glance, answer questions, approve requests, and jump back to the right terminal panel in one click. Local-first, no cloud, no account.

launches.name: King Louie
launches.tagline: BYOK Open Source Desktop AI agent that actually runs code
launches.description: I got tired of paying for five AI subscriptions and babysitting every step. King Louie connects to 13 providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Ollama, xAI, DeepSeek and more. Bring your own keys, set routing rules so the right model gets picked automatically. ~20 built-in agent tools: Bash, file ops, git with safety guards, headless browser, background tasks, sub-agent spawning. Real workflows, not suggestions. MIT licensed. Cross-platform. Looking for contributors.

launches.name: Byoky
launches.tagline: Share your AI budget without sharing your keys
launches.description: More than a wallet. Byoky is a network that lets your AI tokens flow between people, apps, and providers. Gift your spare budget to anyone. Translate between Claude, GPT, and Gemini on the fly. Connect from your phone via QR. 13 providers, open source.

launches.name: Keyshift AI
launches.tagline: AI anywhere you type
launches.description: Keyshift lets you use AI anywhere you type — no tabs, no copy-paste. Just select text and trigger AI instantly to rewrite, fix grammar, translate, or summarize. Built for speed with keyboard shortcuts, command palette, and multi-step workflows. Works across all apps so you stay in flow and never break context.

launches.name: Fabi
launches.tagline: Cloud agent to build internal apps and automate workflows
launches.description: Fabi connects to your tools and data to build internal apps and automate workflows.

launches.name: AutoKap — Automated Screenshots for SaaS
launches.tagline: Your SaaS screenshots on autopilot, powered by your AI IDE
launches.description: AutoKap turns screenshots into code. Ask Cursor or Claude Code to write a capture preset, run it locally, and get polished assets across every locale, theme, and viewport (and mockups!) — AI-verified, Studio-beautified, ready to ship. Stop hand-retaking screenshots.

launches.name: EPUB Compressor
launches.tagline: Shrink & reduce eBook size
launches.description: Compress EPUB files, save storage space, and optimize your ebook library in seconds. 100% on-device. No cloud, no accounts, no waiting.

launches.name: CVPage
launches.tagline: Your CV. One permanent link. Share it everywhere.
launches.description: Stop searching. Every time someone asks for your resume, you waste minutes searching your phone, finding the wrong version, or sending an outdated file. CVPage fixes this with one permanent link —cvpage.io/yourname Upload your CV once. Share the link everywhere: → LinkedIn bio → Email signature When someone opens your link, they see a clean professional profile and can download your CV instantly. ✦ Multiple CV versions ✦ See who viewed your profile ✦ QR code ✦ AI-powered CV review

launches.name: Trentarev
launches.tagline: Trade smarter, supercharged by AI
launches.description: Trentarev keeps your calls, market context, and AI insights aligned in one desktop workspace. Built for multi-monitor workflows.

launches.name: LaunchKit Ship &Promote Your SaaS Faster
launches.tagline: Launch your product in days, not weeks.
launches.description: Building a product is hard — launching it is harder. Makers waste weeks setting up landing pages, waitlists, email capture, and promotion before getting real feedback. LaunchKit gives you everything you need to launch and promote your product in one place. Create a launch-ready landing page in minutes, collect emails fast, follow a built-in checklist, and start promoting immediately. Perfect for indie makers who want to validate ideas and ship faster. 🚀

launches.name: SiteAuditPro
launches.tagline: Analyze Your Website's SEO, GEO & Marketing Score
launches.description: Get a complete one-click audit of your website’s SEO performance, AI/LLM readiness, and marketing effectiveness. SiteAuditPro instantly analyzes your site and delivers clear scores on: • Technical & on-page SEO • How well your content is optimized for AI crawlers • Content quality and marketing strength Receive actionable recommendations to improve your rankings and make your website future-proof for both Google and AI search.

launches.name: JetOpti
launches.tagline: Charter private jets directly from operators. No brokers.
launches.description: JetOpti is a real-time private jet charter marketplace that connects customers directly with charter operators across Europe. See available jets on a live map, get instant pricing, and book directly - no brokers. Operators connect their fleet via Leon or FL3XX integration. Empty leg flights are automatically detected and offered as Hot Deals at discounted prices. Built for operators who want direct customer access and full price control, and for travelers who want transparency and speed.

launches.name: UseVouchly
launches.tagline: Stop asking for reviews. Let AI get them at checkout.
launches.description: Asking clients for reviews is awkward. UseVouchly intercepts their "moment of joy"—the exact second they pay via your Stripe checkout. Our AI instantly drafts a personalized 5-star testimonial for them to approve in one click. Zero friction.

launches.name: AetherCEO — Your AI Executive Team
launches.tagline: Autonomous AI Executive Team for Solo Founders
launches.description: 7 specialized AI executives — strategy, code, design, monetization, launch, marketing, and support — working 24/7 to ship your product. Starting at $29/month.

launches.name: WinifyAI — AI RFP Response Software
launches.tagline: AI RFP response software for fast-moving teams
launches.description: Upload an RFP, extract the compliance matrix, and generate draft responses from past proposals. Winify AI helps small service teams respond faster and more consistently.

launches.name: LinkForty
launches.tagline: Managed deeplinks with an AI copilot. Open-source engine.
launches.description: LinkForty is a modern deeplink + mobile attribution platform - a managed alternative to AppsFlyer and Branch. Cloud includes: → Real-time analytics with AI copilot that understands your links → Native SDKs for iOS, Android, React Native, Expo, Flutter → Team workspaces, custom domains, webhooks → Free tier + 14-day Pro trial, no card Under the hood, the redirect + tracking engine is open-source (AGPL-3.0). Self-host it if you need full data ownership.

launches.name: ReturnSaver AI
launches.tagline: Stop e-commerce return losses with AI
launches.description: ReturnSaver AI analyzes your return data with AI to identify patterns, reduce return rates, and save costs. Upload your CSV and get actionable insights in minutes.

launches.name: Mermaid to LucidChart
launches.tagline: Turn Mermaid flowcharts into editable Lucidchart files
launches.description: Convert Mermaid flowcharts from ChatGPT or other LLMs into editabledrawio files for Lucidchart or diagrams.net import. Paste Mermaid code you get from any LLM, preview the result, and download an import-ready file in seconds.

launches.name: Loom
launches.tagline: A journal that reads your mood and reflects it back
launches.description: Loom is a journal that actually reads what you write. No mood scales. No emoji grids. You write — Loom detects your emotion and shifts its visual atmosphere to match. Calm turns teal. Joy glows warm. Anxiety pulses. After you write, an AI companion reflects with you, notices patterns, and asks questions a good friend would. Weekly insights surface themes you kept returning to. Built by a solo dev. Private by design — entries never leave your device unencrypted. Free (30 reflections/day). iOS.

launches.name: ThinkLeft
launches.tagline: Know when your brain is sharp. Track fatigue.
launches.description: Every decision drains mental energy — but most people have no idea when their brain is actually running on fumes. ThinkLeft gives you a real-time 0–100 cognitive fatigue score based on 4 signals: decisions made, time of day, fidgeting, and app hopping. After a few days it calibrates to YOUR baseline — so you see your personal peak hours and afternoon slump, not a generic average. Free. iPhone only.

launches.name: Course or Nothing
launches.tagline: All Skills are Monetizable
launches.description: The AI that tells you what course to sell — no matter how ridiculous your skill is. Type anything about yourself and Course or Nothing generates a complete course curriculum, pricing, modules, bonuses, and a sales pitch in seconds. Built as a joke on the “everyone should sell a course” era of the internet — but it actually works. All skills are monetizable. 🟩​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

launches.name: Material Lab
launches.tagline: Agentic tool for optimal material selection (ATOMS)
launches.description: Instantly Find the Perfect Material for Your Engineering Project Save hours of material research. Get ranked material recommendations with trade-off analysis in 30 seconds. Find property constraints, material costs, molecular composition, and top US suppliers in an instant.

launches.name: Vibescribe
launches.tagline: Track your mood. Understand yourself.
launches.description: VibeScribe is your personal space to reflect, track, and understand your emotions. Capture daily thoughts, log your mood, and uncover patterns through clean insights and analytics. Build a consistent journaling habit with helpful prompts and streaks. Your data stays private, always. Stay mindful, gain clarity, and take control of your emotional well-being—one entry at a time with VibeScribe.

launches.name: OTWarden
launches.tagline: ICS/OT vulnerability alerts before attackers exploit them
launches.description: OTWarden monitors CISA, Siemens ProductCERT, Rockwell, and BSI advisories and emails you within 2 hours when a vulnerability affects your ICS/OT systems. Built for OT security engineers, SOC teams, and MSSPs who can't afford to miss a critical advisory. Set up a watchlist by vendor, product, or sector. Filter by CVSS severity. Track your assets and see exactly which ones are at risk. No more manually checking CISA every morning. Plans from £29/month with a 14-day free trial.

launches.name: VoiceHotKey Speech to Text
launches.tagline: Your voice is a keyboard. VoiceHotKey – Dictate Instantly!
launches.description: VoiceHotKey is voice transcription application that transforms your spoken words into text with just a hotkey press. Dictation that works in any application in any language. Use your voice as a keyboard with VoiceKey

launches.name: LoreData
launches.tagline: Generate lore-accurate personas from pop culture.
launches.description: Generic demo users like "John Doe" work for smoke tests but feel flat in real product demos. LoreData generates recognizable personas from a single fictional universe, so fields stay coherent by design. Recognizable characters make demos and screenshots self-explanatory. Built for developers seeding databases, designers mocking up profiles, and content creators making tutorials or talk slides.

launches.name: UrlToVideo
launches.tagline: Turn any URL into a promo video with AI
launches.description: Transform any URL into engaging videos instantly with AI. Create professional content for marketing, social media, and e-commerce in minutes with UrlToVideo.

launches.name: Open Passkey
launches.tagline: Post-quantum passkey repo with zero config deploy
launches.description: Open Passkey is an MIT licensed passkey repo with a FREE "backendless" auth server that means you can deploy with zero config. Support for 6 languages and 26 frameworks, with batteries included. Open Passkey prioritizes post-quantum algos though they are not supported by browsers yet.

launches.name: DevCodex for WordPress
launches.tagline: A developer's toolkit for WordPress themes and plugins
launches.description: A grab-bag of focused WordPress utilities for theme and plugin developers — WP_Query builder, hook finder, functions.php snippets,htaccess generator, and WP-Cron event code generator. All free, browser-based, no signup.

launches.name: BabaCAD Robotics
launches.tagline: Free Online Industrial Robotic Arm Simulation Software
launches.description: Free, online (web-based), industrial-grade, cross platform, no download, no subscriptions, instantly starting, industrial robot arm simulation and OLP software.

launches.name: VidDownloader
launches.tagline: The Fastest Ad-Free Video Downloader & MP3 Converter.
launches.description: Download high-quality videos and extract MP3 audio from YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, and Instagram with zero pop-up ads. Built for speed, privacy, and a premium user experience.

launches.name: Secure Wi-Fi
launches.tagline: Find hidden devices & secure your Wi-Fi instantly.
launches.description: Worried about who is on your Wi-Fi? Secure Wi-Fi Network Scanner lets you instantly discover all connected devices, detect potential vulnerabilities, and ensure your network is safe. Perfect for home use and public hotspots.

launches.name: Adava
launches.tagline: AI UGC content for Ecom brands (product in hands)
launches.description: Create viral, high-converting product holding videos and AI UGC in minutes. The ultimate video creation platform for brands and creators.

launches.name: SnagRelay
launches.tagline: Collect User Feedback. Send It Straight to Your Tracker.
launches.description: Clients, testers, and users click the widget, point at the issue, and hit send — no account needed. SnagRelay captures the screenshot, session replay, console logs, network data, and writes repro steps automatically. The complete ticket lands in Jira, Linear, GitHub, Trello, or 15+ other tools — with priority scored, duplicates detected, and assignee routed. No separate board. No back-and-forth. Add one script tag, connect your tracker with OAuth, and you're live in under 5 minutes. From $5/mo.

launches.name: VideoFlowEngine
launches.tagline: Fast video hosting for WordPress without slowing your site
launches.description: Videos are a major reason WordPress sites slow down. Most either embed from third-party platforms (limited control) or host videos directly (hurts performance). VideoFlowEngine fixes this by bringing optimized video delivery into WordPress. • HLS streaming • Lightweight player • No external platforms Built for developers, agencies, and creators who want speed and control.

launches.name: ClearFeedback.io
launches.tagline: Capture visual feedback, bug reports and feature requests.
launches.description: ClearFeedback is an all-in-one user feedback tool designed to help teams move faster. Let users capture bug reports with screenshots, annotations and consolidate feature requests in one place. Maintain total transparency with an integrated public roadmap.

launches.name: Jazylu
launches.tagline: Stop paying for things you forgot you subscribed to
launches.description: Most people have 5 - 10 active subscriptions they've lost track of. Jazylu puts them all in one place - what you're spending monthly and yearly, what's renewing in the next 7 days, and what's worth cancelling. No account linking, no bank access. You add what you pay, we show you the full picture. Free during early access.

launches.name: resontr
launches.tagline: Every great business decision, reverse-engineered
launches.description: Most content tells you what happened. RESONTR tells you why — and what rule to take away. Every Decision Card deconstructs a real move from Spotify, Amazon, Samsung or Shell into four layers: the pressure, the options, the bet, and the transferable rule. Free. No account. Just open it and think better. Built for founders and operators who make hard calls.

launches.name: VoxBee
launches.tagline: Dictation. Transcription. Meeting recording - all in one!
launches.description: Offline dictation, audio transcription, and meeting notes with on-device Whisper and NVIDIA Parakeet models. Private voice workflow for Mac & Linux with optional AI summaries.

launches.name: Sonder: Your RSS Narrator
launches.tagline: RSS news hands-free: text-to-speech, podcasts & Android Auto
launches.description: Sonder is an RSS reader for Android that reads your feeds out loud, so you can stay on top of the news without looking at your screen. It combines RSS, podcasts, and a smart playlist in a single app, with Android Auto support for listening on the road. Most RSS readers are built for reading. Sonder is built for listening. You can add any RSS or Atom feed, tag articles automatically, build a playback queue, and control everything from your car. No account required, no subscription.

launches.name: Volta by MRVL
launches.tagline: 40+ UK EV charging networks, unified in one map
launches.description: Volta unifies 40+ UK charging networks into a single map with real-time availability, transparent pricing, and community-reported reliability scores. No more switching between apps to find a working charger.

launches.name: Konnect for Business
launches.tagline: Mobile CRM with AI messages + WhatsApp deep links
launches.description: Konnect for Business is the CRM built for people who work on their phone — client management, AI-generated follow-up messages, campaign tracking, and one-tap WhatsApp outreach. No desktop required.

launches.name: Sosin
launches.tagline: Speak. Text appears. Online or offline.
launches.description: Press a hotkey, dictate, get polished text. Sosin's AI cleans fillers, fixes grammar, and formats your speech into ready-to-send text. Works online or fully offline with Gemma 4 — nothing leaves your Mac. From €2.99/month.

launches.name: Filesty
launches.tagline: Free file tools that work entirely in your browser
launches.description: Filesty is a collection of free file conversion and utility tools. Everything runs client-side in your browser. Your files never leave your device - nothing is uploaded to any server. No account required. No watermarks. No limits.

launches.name: DISCLOSURE
launches.tagline: Liberating Security Research
launches.description: Presenting disclosure, A federated and liberated bug bounty and vulnerability disclosure platform. Security researchers and companies communicate directly — no middleman, no platform fees, no gatekeepers. Researchers disclose vulnerabilities on their own terms. Companies run bug bounty programs on their own servers. They find each other through federation.

launches.name: TaxSimple
launches.tagline: Free UK tax calculator for self-employed  no signup
launches.description: Free UK self-assessment tax calculator for 2025/26. Built for self-employed workers, freelancers, and landlords. Calculates income tax, National Insurance (Class 2 & 4), all 16 expense categories, mileage, home office, rental income, dividends, and payments on account. No signup. No email. Instant results. HMRC-verified rates. Unlike GoSimpleTax (£30+/year), TaxSimple is completely free. Optional PDF report with HMRC box references for £12.99.

launches.name: Magnetic
launches.tagline: Start speaking conidently
launches.description: A 66-day speaking confidence app. Record one voice challenge a day, get RPG-style stats, and watch yourself level up.

launches.name: Llenoporfavor
launches.tagline: Find the cheapest gas station near you in Spain. Free!
launches.description: Compare real-time fuel prices across 12,000+ gas stations in Spain. Based on official government data, updated every morning. No signup, no app, no ads in your face — just open the map and find the cheapest station near you. Save up to €500/year.

launches.name: Commit Lite
launches.tagline: No-nonsense workout tracker. Built for the gym.
launches.description: A no-nonsense workout tracker for serious lifters. Log sets, reps and weights with a clean UI built for sweaty hands and gym lighting. Rest timer lives on the Dynamic Island and lock screen — no need to unlock between sets. Templates with rep ranges, programs with auto-rotation, year-long heatmap and streaks. PR tracking. CSV export. 4 languages. No account — data stays on device.
